model-upgrade-eval.intent: Build formal eval harness using gavel-ai to compare gemini-3-flash, claude-haiku, and gemini-3-pro against gemini-2.5-flash baseline across all 3 LLM tasks (headline extraction, interpretation, daily summary) to select a safe replacement before deprecation

feat/dataset-prep.intent: Dataset preparation script and validation for eval scenarios from working/gcs golden data

feat/run-and-select.intent: Run evaluations for all model candidates, fill results in eval-spec, select winning model, update common.py
